gjcObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: Add subfamily hierarchy (family-tree second level)
goals.objective: Re-add subfamily?: string to IdeologyLabel type (src/types/label.ts). Assign a subfamily to all 24 existing labels grouping within their family (e.g. socialist -> libertarian-socialist/state-socialist; libertarian-leaning -> minarchist/market-anarchist/geoist; conservative -> traditional/religious/authoritarian-adjacent). Extend the familyTree scoring output (src/scoring/index.ts) to a two-level family -> subfamily -> label structure (or add a familySubtree field), and render it nested in src/components/ResultsScreen.tsx (family group > subfamily group > labels). Add a dataValidity assertion that every label has a subfamily and update familyTree tests for the two-level shape. Verify npm test.
goals.evidence: Subfamily two-level family-tree: subfamily on all 24 labels, familySubtree output, nested render, dataValidity + familySubtree tests. npm test 138/138, tsc clean. Architect CLEAR/APPROVE; LOW finding fixed.

completionVerification.gjcObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: Add remaining label-family subtypes
goals.objective: Add 6 new subtype labels with original clean-room descriptions and 26-axis centroids grounded in SEP/Britannica: monarchist/reactionary family (absolute-monarchist, neoreactionary), green family (ecosocialist, degrowth-green), nationalist family (civic-nationalist, ethnonationalist). Assign each a family + subfamily. Add a calibration archetype for each so archetype-sweep covers all 30 labels (each resolves to self as #1 or documented near-tie). Wire the new subtypes into the relevant faction modules' subtypeLabelIds (green-faction-module, nationalist-faction-module, authoritarian-faction-module). Keep dataValidity centroid-coverage + subtypeLabelIds assertions green. Verify npm test, lint, build, and a browser check.
